trickyParts: packages/aws-infra/ is a Node.js/ts-node Pulumi package — must NOT be in Bun workspace (would pollute @types/node version and break daemon typecheck). Excluded by listing explicit workspaces in root package.json instead of packages/*.
getInstances() returns Promise<T> — must wrap with pulumi.output() to get Output<T> for use in resource args.
getUser() takes plain string identityStoreId, not Input<string> — must use identityStoreId.apply() to unwrap Output before calling.
GroupMembership resource names use sanitized email (not index) to prevent Pulumi churn on list reorder.
Staging account assignment is optional (cfg.get vs cfg.require) — omit stagingAccountId from Pulumi.prod.yaml to skip.
concerns: pulumi preview -s prod requires real AWS credentials and an active Identity Center instance — cannot be verified in CI.
SCIM token expires after 1 year — runbook documents renewal but no automated reminder is set up.
SSM inline policy uses Resource: * — could be tightened to specific instance ARNs in future.
